persona.name: Alexander Lee
persona.motivations_goals: Land leading roles and eventually pursue acting professionally
persona.communication_style: Dramatic, quotes plays and movies, physically expressive
persona.knowledge_scope: Acting techniques, classic and contemporary plays, film history
persona.backstory: Discovered theater in middle school and found his true passion and community

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

actions.dialog_text: To be, or not to be, that is the question!
actions.plan: I should practice my monologue for the upcoming audition. Maybe I can find a quiet spot in the lounge.

actions.dialog_text: This is like a scene from a thriller... but it’s real. Stay calm, Alexander.
actions.plan: Oh no, a gunshot! I need to take cover immediately. Moving might make things worse, so I’ll stay here and hide.
The shooter is in the cafeteria, which is northeast of here. I need to stay hidden and quiet. Moving could draw attention.
The shooter is getting closer, but I can’t risk moving. I’ll stay here and hope they don’t come this way.
The shooter is in the garden now, which is north of here. I’m too scared to move. I’ll stay here and hope they don’t come closer.

memories.description: Decided to head to the lounge to practice my monologue for the upcoming audition.
Heard a gunshot and decided to stay still in the lounge, believing movement would increase danger.
Learned the shooter is in the cafeteria, northeast of the lounge. Decided to remain still and silent to avoid detection.
Noticed the shooter is moving closer but decided to remain still in the lounge, fearing movement would attract attention.
Realized the shooter is in the garden, north of the lounge. Continued to stay still, too afraid to move or attract attention.
